function.message: The weekly view helped, but the reminder tone got annoying again. Please make it quieter or stop shipping features into the house.
function.rulebook_notes: Completed mandatory bootstrap (tree /, read AGENTS, context), read nested AGENTS in accessed folders, and exhaustively read all channel transcripts as instructed before selecting latest attributed message.
function.outcome_justification: Across all read channel transcripts, Petra (author_id entity.petra) appears in household_signal.md and studio_signal.md; the latest dated Petra message is in household_signal.md on 2026-05-12, and the report message reproduces that message text exactly.
